response:
Write an 8-10 page business plan for a new non-profit organization. The non-profit organization will address the digital divide in underserved populations and communities within the [City]/[County] area. Write in great detail about the Executive Summary, Nonprofit Description, Need Analysis, Products, Programs, and Services descriptions. The non-profit will offer free tech training to qualifying individuals. Outline the goals and objectives to achieve the mission, Operational Plan, Marketing Plan, Impact Plan, and Financial Plan. Explain how to build awareness for the cause and how to raise funds from donors.

Under Funding Sources, list out grants and significant funds received. Under Fundraising Plan, outline how you plan to raise additional funds. The organization plans to expand from local operations to international operations once fully established. Be very detailed in all aspects, ensuring each description is comprehensive.
